name: neural-flow-architect
description: Research flow-state co-pilot for high-bandwidth BCI computer use: multi-dimensional engagement proxies, proactive local agent, digital/physical environment hooks, and personalization. Local-first CLI (+ optional companion UI). Not a medical device, not implant firmware, not a hosted product demo.
disclaimers: Research / assistive-technology software only — not a medical device (SaMD).
Not implant firmware and not affiliated with Neuralink Corp.
User override (Pause / Undo) and local-first privacy are first-class.
No hosted live product demo; run CLI and optional local frontend yourself.
